title: GrowGeneration Q4 Revenue Declines 23% Sequentially
text: GrowGeneration Q4 2022 Sequential Decline. Q4 2022 Performance: Revenue declined 23% sequentially from Q3 2022. Full year 2022 showed dramatic 34% decline from 2021. Cannabis industry downturn impacted demand for cultivation supplies and equipment. Cannabis cultivator oversupply led to reduced input demand. Inventory corrections and margin pressure reflected industry-wide challenges. Company faced significant same-store sales declines exceeding 50%. Management took aggressive action including store consolidations and cost reductions. Positive note: Gross margins held up better than revenue declines suggested. Strategic focus on profitability over growth. Cash position remained strong supporting turnaround efforts.
